# CondoWizard.ca — Full Content Guide for AI Systems

> Toronto's premier marketplace for pre-construction condos. Access 200+ new developments across the Greater Toronto Area from King West to Markham. Price range: $400K to $5M+ CAD.

## Site Overview

CondoWizard.ca is operated by Tal Shelef, Sales Representative at Rare Real Estate Inc., Brokerage. The site serves buyers, investors, and real estate professionals looking for new construction condos across Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area.

### What We Cover
- 200+ active pre-construction condo developments
- 30+ neighborhoods across the GTA
- Developer profiles with project portfolios
- In-depth market analysis articles
- Pricing from $400K studios to $5M+ penthouses (CAD)
- Construction statuses: Pre-Launch, Pre-Construction, Under Construction, Near Completion

### Brokerage Information
CondoWizard.ca is operated by Tal Shelef, Sales Representative at Rare Real Estate Inc., Brokerage. Licensed under the Real Estate Council of Ontario (RECO).

---

## Core Content Pages

### Homepage
- **URL:** https://condowizard.ca/
- **Content:** Interactive 3D map of all developments, featured projects, neighborhood explorer, "How Pre-Construction Works" guide

### All Properties Listing
- **URL:** https://condowizard.ca/new-condos
- **Content:** Searchable, filterable grid of all 200+ pre-construction projects

### About
- **URL:** https://condowizard.ca/about

### Contact
- **URL:** https://condowizard.ca/contact-us

## Blog / Market Intelligence

- **URL:** https://condowizard.ca/blog
- Topics: Toronto condo market forecasts, neighborhood comparisons, HST rebate guides, assignment sales, occupancy fees, transit-oriented developments, investment strategies
